allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'metadata.json entries: {len\(data\)}'\); ids=[d['id'] for d in data]; print\('\\n'.join\(ids\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Remote metadata entries: {len\(data\)}'\); print\('\\n'.join\([d['id'] for d in data]\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'skill-packages index entries: {len\(data\)}'\); print\('\\n'.join\(data\)\)")
